note: seq=127: CZDS status-publish fix. The collector now self-loads /etc/atlas/autopull.env + db.env (stripping `export ` which systemd EnvironmentFile ignores) so STATUS_TOKEN/STATUS_REPO are present -> czds.json publishes to the dashboard/sentinel. No data-path change. Re-runs the collector (no-block) so czds.json posts the confirmed result this cycle.

steps.note: seq=127: czds.json publish fix (self-load status env).

steps.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""A.T.L.A.S. CZDS collector -- ICANN Centralized Zone Data Service.
Pulls APPROVED zone files daily, diffs each zone against the prior day's snapshot
to extract NEWLY-registered domains (true Channel-1 business-birth signal), and
lands each NEW domain into atlas.business via the shared `socrata_import` (si)
importer, source='czds_<tld>'. FIRST run per zone builds a baseline and emits 0
(never floods intake with the millions of pre-existing domains). Creds come from
/etc/atlas/czds.env (CZDS_USER/CZDS_PASS) -- never in the repo. Idempotent,
fail-soft, reports honestly. --selftest runs offline logic checks."""
import os, sys, json, time, datetime, subprocess, urllib.request, urllib.error
sys.path.insert(0, "/opt/atlas/importers")

NODE     = os.environ.get("NODE_ID", "hetzner")
STATE    = os.environ.get("CZDS_STATE", "/opt/atlas/czds_state")
ENVFILE  = os.environ.get("CZDS_ENV", "/etc/atlas/czds.env")
AUTH_URL = "https://account-api.icann.org/api/authenticate"
LINKS_URL= "https://czds-api.icann.org/czds/downloads/links"
NEW_CAP  = int(os.environ.get("CZDS_NEW_CAP", "80000"))
UA       = "atlas-czds/1.0 (+https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests)"

def load_creds():
    u = os.environ.get("CZDS_USER"); pw = os.environ.get("CZDS_PASS")
    if os.path.exists(ENVFILE):
        for ln in open(ENVFILE):
            ln = ln.strip()
            if ln.startswith("CZDS_USER="): u = ln.split("=", 1)[1]
            elif ln.startswith("CZDS_PASS="): pw = ln.split("=", 1)[1]
    return u, pw

def load_status_env():
    """Populate STATUS_* / DB env from /etc/atlas/*.env, stripping `export ` (systemd
    EnvironmentFile ignores export-prefixed lines, so the unit env can be incomplete)."""
    for p in ("/etc/atlas/autopull.env", "/etc/atlas/db.env"):
        if not os.path.exists(p):
            continue
        for ln in open(p):
            ln = ln.strip()
            if ln.startswith("export "):
                ln = ln[7:]
            if "=" not in ln or ln.startswith("#"):
                continue
            k, v = ln.split("=", 1)
            k = k.strip(); v = v.strip().strip('"').strip("'")
            if k and k not in os.environ:
                os.environ[k] = v

def authenticate(u, pw):
    body = json.dumps({"username": u, "password": pw}).encode()
    req = urllib.request.Request(AUTH_URL, data=body,
        headers={"Content-Type": "application/json", "User-Agent": UA})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=90) as r:
        return json.load(r).get("accessToken")

def list_links(token):
    req = urllib.request.Request(LINKS_URL,
        headers={"Authorization": "Bearer " + token, "User-Agent": UA})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=90) as r:
        return json.load(r)

def tld_of(url):
    base = url.rstrip("/").split("/")[-1]
    return base[:-5] if base.endswith(".zone") else base

def fetch_zone_sorted(token, url, out_sorted):
    tmp = out_sorted + ".gz"
    req = urllib.request.Request(url,
        headers={"Authorization": "Bearer " + token, "User-Agent": UA})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=1200) as r, open(tmp, "wb") as f:
        while True:
            chunk = r.read(1 << 20)
            if not chunk:
                break
            f.write(chunk)
    cmd = ("zcat '%s' 2>/dev/null | awk '{print tolower($1)}' | sed 's/\\.$//' "
           "| grep -E '^[a-z0-9-]+\\.[a-z0-9.-]+$' | sort -u -S 1G -T %s > '%s'"
           % (tmp, STATE, out_sorted))
    subprocess.run(["bash", "-lc", cmd], check=True)
    os.remove(tmp)

def new_domains(baseline, today, capfile):
    cmd = "comm -13 '%s' '%s' | head -n %d > '%s'" % (baseline, today, NEW_CAP, capfile)
    subprocess.run(["bash", "-lc", cmd], check=True)
    tot = subprocess.run(["bash", "-lc", "comm -13 '%s' '%s' | wc -l" % (baseline, today)],
                         capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.strip()
    n = sum(1 for _ in open(capfile))
    try: tot = int(tot)
    except Exception: tot = n
    return n, tot

def land(domains_file, tld):
    import socrata_import as si
    SRC = "czds_%s" % tld
    today = datetime.date.today().isoformat()
    birth = today + "T00:00:00"
    conn = si.connect_pg(); conn.autocommit = False; cur = conn.cursor(); inserted = 0
    for line in open(domains_file):
        dom = line.strip().lower()
        if not dom or "." not in dom:
            continue
        cur.execute(si.SR_EXISTS, (SRC, dom))
        if cur.fetchone():
            continue
        vals = [si.clip(dom), si.norm_name(dom), "https://" + dom,
                None, None, None, None, None, None, "US", None, None, "newly_registered_domain"]
        payload = json.dumps({"domain": dom, "tld": tld, "birth_date": birth,
                              "source": SRC, "via": "czds_zone_diff"}, sort_keys=True)
        ch = si.content_hash(payload)
        cur.execute("SAVEPOINT r")
        try:
            cur.execute(si.BIZ_INSERT, vals); bid = cur.fetchone()[0]
            cur.execute(si.SR_INSERT, (SRC, dom, bid, ch, payload))
            cur.execute("RELEASE SAVEPOINT r"); inserted += 1
        except Exception:
            cur.execute("ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT r")
        if inserted % 500 == 0:
            conn.commit()
    conn.commit(); conn.close()
    return inserted

def gh_put(path, obj):
    tok = os.environ.get("STATUS_TOKEN"); repo = os.environ.get("STATUS_REPO")
    api = os.environ.get("STATUS_API_BASE", "https://api.github.com"); br = os.environ.get("STATUS_BRANCH", "main")
    if not tok or not repo:
        return "skipped"
    import base64
    url = "%s/repos/%s/contents/%s" % (api, repo, path); sha = None
    try:
        r = urllib.request.Request(url + "?ref=" + br, headers={"Authorization": "Bearer " + tok,
            "Accept": "application/vnd.github+json", "User-Agent": "atlas"})
        sha = json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(r, timeout=20)).get("sha")
    except Exception:
        sha = None
    body = {"message": "czds status", "content": base64.b64encode(json.dumps(obj, indent=2).encode()).decode(), "branch": br}
    if sha: body["sha"] = sha
    try:
        rq = urllib.request.Request(url, data=json.dumps(body).encode(), method="PUT",
            headers={"Authorization": "Bearer " + tok, "Accept": "application/vnd.github+json",
                     "User-Agent": "atlas", "Content-Type": "application/json"})
        urllib.request.urlopen(rq, timeout=25); return "put_ok"
    except Exception as e:
        return "err_%s" % type(e).__name__

def selftest():
    ok = True
    def chk(n, c):
        nonlocal ok; print(("  ok  " if c else "  FAIL") + " " + n); ok = ok and c
    chk("tld_of strips .zone", tld_of("https://czds-api.icann.org/czds/downloads/org.zone") == "org")
    chk("tld_of bare", tld_of("https://x/czds/downloads/com") == "com")
    print("SELFTEST", "PASS" if ok else "FAIL"); return 0 if ok else 1

def main():
    if "--selftest" in sys.argv:
        sys.exit(selftest())
    load_status_env()
    os.makedirs(STATE, exist_ok=True)
    out = {"kind": "czds", "node": NODE, "ts": int(time.time()),
           "run_date": datetime.date.today().isoformat(), "zones": [], "new_rows": 0}
    u, pw = load_creds()
    if not u or not pw:
        out["status"] = "no_creds"
        out["publish"] = gh_put("status/%s/czds.json" % NODE, out)
        print("CZDS=" + json.dumps(out)); sys.exit(0)
    try:
        token = authenticate(u, pw)
        links = list_links(token)
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        out["status"] = "auth_or_links_http_%s" % e.code
        out["publish"] = gh_put("status/%s/czds.json" % NODE, out)
        print("CZDS=" + json.dumps(out)); sys.exit(0)
    except Exception as e:
        out["status"] = "unreachable_%s" % type(e).__name__
        out["publish"] = gh_put("status/%s/czds.json" % NODE, out)
        print("CZDS=" + json.dumps(out)); sys.exit(0)
    out["approved_zones"] = len(links)
    total_new = 0
    for url in links:
        tld = tld_of(url)
        z = {"tld": tld}
        today_f = os.path.join(STATE, tld + ".today")
        base_f  = os.path.join(STATE, tld + ".seen")
        cap_f   = os.path.join(STATE, tld + ".new")
        try:
            fetch_zone_sorted(token, url, today_f)
            if not os.path.exists(base_f):
                os.replace(today_f, base_f)
                z["status"] = "baseline_built"; z["new"] = 0; z["total_new"] = 0
            else:
                n, tot = new_domains(base_f, today_f, cap_f)
                landed = land(cap_f, tld) if n else 0
                os.replace(today_f, base_f)
                z["status"] = "live" if land
